resources.string: Please click on the below link to view the Privacy Policy of Hindu Bhakti AI Application:

Developed by:
 GenAi TechWorks pvt ltd.


AI Platforms:
 • ChatGPT
 • Google Gemini
 • Co-Pilot


Design and UX:
 • Material Design 3
 • Android Jetpack


Special Thanks:
 • Open-source community
 • Beta testers and users


Icons and Media:
 • Material Icons
 • Open-source assets


© 2026 Hindu Bhakti AI . All rights reserved.
Add your favorite images by tapping on the Heart(❤️) icon.

• Exquisite Collection of Hindu Deities:
Explore a visually stunning library of AI-generated devotional images of Lord Shiva, Vishnu, Krishna, Rama, Hanuman, Goddess Durga, and more.

• Create Personalized Divine Images:
Generate meaningful devotional images using expert-crafted AI prompts on platforms like Gemini or ChatGPT.

• Soulful Devotional Music:
Immerse yourself in calming bhakti music dedicated to each deity.

• Favourites Collection:
Save and organize your favourite devotional images for quick access.

• Free Access to Expert-Crafted AI Prompts:
Enjoy a rich library of carefully designed prompts at no cost.

• Enhance AI Prompting Skills:
Learn, refine, and master AI prompting techniques by studying complete prompts.

• Practical Usage of Generated Images:
Use AI-generated images as wallpapers, WhatsApp display pictures or for personal devotion.
Pls note - Image generating feature in Gemini/ChatGPT/Copilot is available only if user is Logged-in.
Paste the prompt ans see devine picture generated by AI
Choose AI tool - Gemini, ChatGpt, Dall-E
Tap to generate the prompt and watch the prompt text appeare gradually
Explore your favorite god to make divine you
Follow these simple steps to create AI art
Customize prompts to match your vision. Mix styles and experiment with different AI tools!
Tap the copy prompt button to copy the AI prompt to your clipboard
Open your favorite AI image generator like Gemini, ChatGPT, or others
Paste your prompt into the AI tool to generate a similar image
Upload your photo with good face visibility to generate high quality personalized AI images instantly
Pro Tip: Modify the prompt to match your creative vision!
Please take a moment to rate us!

Experience Devotion Through the Power of AI:\n\nEmbark on a deeply spiritual journey with this unique AI-powered devotional mobile application, thoughtfully designed to help you connect with Hindu deities through faith, devotion (bhakti), and divine blessings.

Join us on this sacred path and immerse yourself in the devotion and bhakti of Hindu deities. Experience faith, serenity, and divine blessings through a harmonious blend of spirituality and AI technology.
Follow these simple steps to create stunning AI-generated art:
Customize prompts to match your creative vision. Mix styles, adjust details, and experiment with different AI tools for the best results.
Pls add the following text to create Custom-Sized images: “Create with Portrait size 9:16 or Square Size 1:1 or 4:3.
